productOptionsHtml:

Catalog highlights

  • Easy to use, all-purpose face-covering accessory that goes anywhere to promote your message with an extra-large imprint area. It can be used as a face cover, head cover, neck scarf, headband, golf towel. Perfect for outdoor, social distancing promotions for runners, walkers, hikers & cyclists.
  • Price Includes: one color imprint, one location. 2 Color Imprints Full Bleed not available. Red ink on Black Bandana not recommended. Maximum of 2 color imprint and one location only.
  • Assorted Colors: Minimum assortment per color is 100 pieces and must be in even increments of 100 pieces (sorry, no exceptions).

Patch options (supplier)

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — "THE AURORA BANDANA" Headband and Neck Wear Silkscreen - Domestic Production - 22” x 22”. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style 7135 on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 12 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 125 units (per catalog line).
